# @cosmosapp/pay_sdk

> Object-oriented JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for the Cosmos Pay Payments API:
> Stellar SEP-7 payment intents, webhooks, products, customers and analytics.
> Two entry points — `@cosmosapp/pay_sdk` (server) and `@cosmosapp/pay_sdk/web`
> (browser wallets: Freighter, xBull, Rabet, LOBSTR, Albedo).

Key facts an integrator must know: the network is chosen by the API key type
(`dv_` → testnet, `prod_` → mainnet); amounts are decimal strings (≤ 7 decimals);
the webhook secret (`whsec_…`) is shown only once on create/rotate; a normal
integration only sets `apiKey` (the gateway URL is pre-configured); requires
Node ≥ 18. The flow has three steps: server creates an intent →
browser completes it with the user's wallet (`WebClient.pay`) →
server validates the resulting txHash (which fires a webhook).

The files below are atomic and self-contained — read the ones relevant to the task.

## Docs

- [Overview](./00-overview.md): what the SDK is, the two entry points, the mental model, key facts
- [Installation](./01-installation.md): npm install, the optional Stellar SDK peer dep, ESM/CJS imports
- [Authentication](./02-authentication.md): API key, network-by-key-type, keeping the key server-side
- [Quickstart](./03-quickstart.md): smallest end-to-end flow + the server/browser split
- [The Client](./04-client.md): managers table, constructor options, structures
- [Payment intents](./05-payment-intents.md): createPay/createTx, fetch/list, edit/cancel/delete, validate
- [Web client](./06-web-client.md): browser wallets, pay() options, custom adapters, DI, direct API
- [Webhooks](./07-webhooks.md): register endpoints, receive events (http/Express), verify signatures
- [Products & customers](./08-products-customers.md): catalog CRUD + payment stats
- [Analytics & health](./09-analytics-health.md): summary, balances, logs, liveness/readiness
- [Assets, wallets & addresses](./10-assets-wallets-addresses.md): typed catalogs + validators
- [Errors & observability](./11-errors-observability.md): error classes, retries, telemetry events
- [Configuration](./12-configuration.md): full option reference + self-hosting
- [Types & enums](./13-types-reference.md): enums, option types, entity payload shapes

## Recipes

- [Recipes](./14-recipes.md): checkout, donations, idempotent webhooks, reconciliation, testnet/mainnet

## Optional

- [Full docs (single file)](./llms-full.txt): every section above concatenated for one-shot ingestion
- [Runnable examples](../examples/README.md): one example per feature (`../examples/*.mjs`)
- [README](../README.md): the human-facing package README
